selected_candidate: Add a continuation_contract.reason enum to schemas/recommendation-readback.schema.json and test the enum values.
alternatives_rejected: Rely only on Go validation; rejected because public readback consumers also need schema-level reason bindings.
Add free-form documentation only; rejected because it would not catch schema drift.
Attempt cross-field schema conditions now; rejected as broader than this bounded node and already covered in Go validation.
decision: Bind the allowed reason vocabulary in schema, unit test it, and assert it during production readiness.
